title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Quest Alliance Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Quest Alliance Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Quest Alliance Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About Quest Alliance Capital India:
Quest Alliance Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quest Alliance Capital India!
